notes: Acquired by Compaq for ~$3B in 1997; NonStop division continues under HPE
Acquired Tandem 1997; itself acquired by HP 2002
HPE NonStop division carries forward Tandem's mission-critical computing heritage; NonStop servers still deployed in stock exchanges and banks
Windows NT Server / Wolfpack clustering; now Windows Server Failover Clustering
Tuxedo API provider; NonStop Tuxedo built on BEA Tuxedo API; BEA acquired by Oracle 2008
Referenced for RDBMS and iTP capabilities on Tandem; acquired BEA Systems 2008
